div.head: The Minister in Honduras (Lay) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
39. The following telegram has been sent to the Legation at Managua:
February 21, 9 a.m. Your February 20, 4 p.m. Under instructions of the Department action was taken by me in accordance with paragraph 3 of Department’s telegram No. 19, February 19, 5 p.m., to you before I received your telegram of February 20, 1 [4] p.m.See telegram No. 35, from the Minister in Nicaragua, supra. President of Honduras accepted my informal suggestion and issued statement to press as follows:
“The Government of Honduras will increase its regular forces now patrolling our Nicaraguan frontier to the proportions necessary
to provide complete protection for the Commission against any attack of the malefactors”.
This statement was published this afternoon in local newspaper as a reply to a question in an interview with a reporter. The Honduran Chargé at Managua has been instructed to communicate it to the Nicaraguan Government also.
